enumerate_node_list:
enum
    {
      none = 0x0,
      x87 = 0x1,
      sse = 0x2,
      avxh = 0x4,
      mpx  = 0x8,
      avx512_k = 0x10,
      avx512_zmm_h = 0x20,
      avx512_ymmh_avx512 = 0x40,
      avx512_xmm_avx512 = 0x80,
      pkeys = 0x100,
      all = x87 | sse | avxh | mpx | avx512_k | avx512_zmm_h
	    | avx512_ymmh_avx512 | avx512_xmm_avx512 | pkeys
    }

enum
    {
      none = 0x0,
      check = 0x1,
      x87 = 0x2 | check,
      sse = 0x4 | check,
      avxh = 0x8 | check,
      mpx  = 0x10 | check,
      avx512_k = 0x20 | check,
      avx512_zmm_h = 0x40 | check,
      avx512_ymmh_avx512 = 0x80 | check,
      avx512_xmm_avx512 = 0x100 | check,
      pkeys = 0x200 | check,
      all = x87 | sse | avxh | mpx | avx512_k | avx512_zmm_h
	    | avx512_ymmh_avx512 | avx512_xmm_avx512 | pkeys
    }
